title: My Account profile expansion, plan options, expiration handling UI, newsletter opt-in, and disclosure updates (frontend-only)

requirements.summary: Update My Account plan dropdown to show all required plan term/price options and persist the user’s selection via backend calls, rehydrating on refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: My Account plan dropdown shows all required options exactly (Free, Basic monthly/6-month/year, Premier monthly/6-month/year) with the listed prices and 'No auto renewals' text for 6-month and yearly options
Selecting a plan updates persisted backend account data for the current user
Reloading the app shows the previously selected plan option

file_operations.description: Replace localStorage-only plan state with backend-backed plan state derived from getCallerUserProfile().selectedPlan; add mutations that call backend selectPlan(plan) (and update caches) so selections persist across reloads.

Update the plan dropdown to use backend PlanOption values and render the full list of required options with exact price/term text, including the 'No auto renewals' language for 6-month and yearly variants. Use shadcn-ui Select/Label/Card to present options (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).
Add centralized plan constants/mappings: PlanOption -> display label (with prices and 'No auto renewals' text), plus helper mapping PlanOption -> plan level (free/basic/premier) for feature gating.

requirements.summary: Reflect plan expiration lifecycle in the UI by showing expiration on My Account, using effective-plan-as-Free after expiration for feature gating, and triggering expiration checks on app load.
acceptanceCriteria: After payment is recorded for a paid plan, My Account shows a populated expiration date
If the current time is past expiration, the effective plan is treated as Free (feature gating uses Free access) even if a paid plan was previously selected

If the current time is past expiration + 7 days, the backend deletes the user’s stored account/profile data and associated user-owned data (e.g., journal entries, mood entries) and subsequent fetches behave like a new/empty account

file_operations.description: When authenticated, call the backend capability checkAndHandleExpirations() on app startup (and/or periodically) and gracefully handle authorization/trap errors, then allow React Query to refetch/rehydrate user/profile-dependent UI.
Add an 'effectivePlanLevel' computed value based on userProfile.planExpirationTimestamp and current time; if expired, return Free for gating regardless of selected paid plan option.
Update feature gating to use the computed effective plan level (free/basic/premier) rather than localStorage state, ensuring behavior becomes Free after expiration.

Display the plan expiration date in the Account Information form using the timestamp returned on the UserProfile, and add a clear UI message when the plan is expired (effective access is Free). Use shadcn-ui Alert/Card typography as needed (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).
Add a small formatting helper to convert backend Time (bigint) into a user-friendly date string for plan start/expiration display.

requirements.summary: Convert the My Account “Account Information” box into an editable form for the required profile fields with save + refresh rehydration, including DOB format validation.
acceptanceCriteria: User can edit the required fields and save them
Date of Birth input enforces or validates MM/DD/YYYY format with user-facing error messaging on invalid format
Saved values display in the same My Account form after reload

file_operations.description: Replace the static Name display with an editable form collecting Full Name, Date of Birth (MM/DD/YYYY), City, State, Email, Phone (optional), Plan enrolled in, and Plan expiration date; add Save behavior that calls saveCallerUserProfile(profile) and rehydrates from getCallerUserProfile() on refresh. Compose existing shadcn-ui form primitives (Card, Label, Select, Input, Button, Alert) without editing ui components (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).
Extend save behavior support for the expanded UserProfile shape by ensuring the save mutation invalidates/refetches currentUserProfile and surfaces errors for UI display.
Add MM/DD/YYYY validation helper for Date of Birth with a clear error message string that the My Account form can display when invalid.

requirements.summary: Ensure authenticated navigation always shows Dashboard, My Account, and Tools as clear clickable destinations accessible from within My Account.
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated header/nav shows Dashboard, My Account, and Tools navigation items
Clicking each item navigates to the correct page without a no-op

file_operations.description: Keep Dashboard/My Account/Tools visible in the authenticated header and ensure Tools remains clickable even if plan selection is missing/expired; route clicks to the correct destination (e.g., redirect to My Account with guidance) rather than disabling the control. Continue using the existing GreenButton/shadcn-ui composition (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).

requirements.summary: Add a My Account Yes/No newsletter opt-in control with the exact question text and persist the selection via backend calls.
acceptanceCriteria: The exact question text is displayed on My Account
Selecting Yes persists newsletterOptIn=true in backend; selecting No persists newsletterOptIn=false (or unset) in backend
The persisted selection is reflected when revisiting My Account

file_operations.description: Add the exact newsletter question text and a Yes/No control (e.g., shadcn-ui RadioGroup or Select) within the Account Information area; persist changes by calling backend toggleNewsletterOptIn(optIn) and/or saving the profile, and reflect the persisted value when reloading. Use shadcn-ui form components for consistent UI (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).
Create a React Query mutation hook that calls backend toggleNewsletterOptIn(optIn) and invalidates currentUserProfile so My Account rehydrates consistently.

requirements.summary: Update My Account disclosure/legal content to include non-auto-renew language for 6-month/year options and the expiration/downgrade/grace-period/auto-deletion policy.
acceptanceCriteria: The Legal & Policies content on My Account includes text covering: non-auto-renew for 6-month and yearly options, plan expiration behavior, downgrade to Free on expiration date, 1-week grace period, and auto-deletion after the grace period

file_operations.description: Revise the Legal & Policies accordion text to explicitly document: 6-month and yearly options are non-auto-renew, plan expiration date behavior, downgrade to Free on expiration, 1-week grace period with Free access, and auto-deletion after the grace period; keep changes confined to the existing My Account legal sections.
